parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ url: $('pick url').item.json.url, formats: ['json'], jsonOptions: { prompt: 'Extract every volleyball club/society listed on this page. Return an array '+ String.fromCharCode(34) + 'clubs' + String.fromCharCode(34) + ' of objects with name, city, region, website (the club own website if shown, else empty), detail_url (a link to this club detail/profile page within this directory, if present). Only real clubs, not navigation.', schema: { type:'object', properties: { clubs: { type:'array', items: { type:'object', properties: { name:{type:'string'}, city:{type:'string'}, region:{type:'string'}, website:{type:'string'} } } } } } } }) }}
